Hi, I'm Rashed Zaman

Results-driven Tech Lead with 10+ years of experience in full-stack development, team leadership, and project management. Leading teams of 36+ developers and delivering scalable solutions.

Remote-ready — experienced collaborating with distributed teams across time zones, using Git, Docker, CI/CD pipelines, Jira, and Slack to deliver projects asynchronously and reliably.

Get In Touch View My Work Download Resume

About Me

Driving Innovation, Building Impact

As a Tech Leader with 10+ years of experience, I have transformed ideas into scalable, high-impact software solutions, leading teams of engineers to deliver products that accelerate business growth.

Currently spearheading a 36-member development team at Onest Tech LLC, I blend deep technical expertise in PHP, Node.js, React, and Cloud Infrastructure with strategic leadership.

I have strong experience working remotely — managing distributed teams, running async code reviews, and maintaining CI/CD workflows across time zones.

Passionate about fostering a culture of innovation, mentorship, and continuous learning, empowering engineers to grow while driving organizational success.

Core Achievements

Leadership & Management
  • Directed cross-functional teams of 40+ developers, delivering scalable enterprise-grade solutions with a 98% client satisfaction rate and zero major post-deployment issues.
  • Managed technology budgets exceeding $2M, achieving a 20% cost reduction while boosting overall system performance by 35%, directly enhancing profitability.
  • Recognized as 'Innovator of the Year' (2022) and 'Employee of the Year' (2017) for exceptional contributions to innovation, efficiency, and business impact.
Technology Innovation
  • Integrated AI/ML features into SaaS platforms, unlocking $500K+ in annual recurring revenue through advanced automation and predictive analytics.
  • Architected and launched 4 mission-critical software systems, reducing downtime by 35% and increasing scalability by 15% across distributed environments.
  • Designed and deployed HRM, LMS, and E-commerce platforms serving 15,000+ active users with high availability and performance consistency.
Process & Delivery Optimization
  • Increased application delivery speed by 25% through Agile transformation, sprint planning optimization, and team velocity improvements.
  • Implemented CI/CD pipelines, Dockerized environments, and automated deployments—cutting deployment cycles by 10% and minimizing release errors.
User Experience & Security
  • Enhanced UX and optimized system performance, leading to a 30% increase in user satisfaction and engagement.
  • Established enterprise-grade cybersecurity protocols ensuring 99.9% uptime, zero data breaches, and full compliance with industry regulations.
Education & Certifications

B.Sc. Computer Science & Engineering — CGPA 3.73

Project Management — Rice University

Web Development Specialization — University of Michigan

Open Source & Packages

Maintainer of popular packages and tools used by developers — contributions include integrations for biometric devices, Laravel installers, and API rate limiting utilities.

jmrashed / zkteco

A PHP package for seamless integration with ZKTeco biometric devices — used for attendance and access control systems.

GitHubPackagist

jmrashed / laravel-installer

A simple installer scaffold for Laravel applications to speed up new project setup and onboarding.

GitHubPackagist

jmrashed-api-rate-limiter

A lightweight API rate-limiting middleware/package to protect endpoints and ensure fair usage for public APIs.

GitHubPackagist
